channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Megan Thee Stallion Announces Split With Klay Thompson, Exit From Moulin Rouge!
item.description: Love won't keep them together! 💔 Megan Thee Stallion's solo show is heating up! 🔥 #MoulinRouge #QueenMeg

item.title: Lady Gaga and Doechii Turn the Dancefloor Into a ‘Runway’ in New Music Video
item.description: Strutting their stuff! 👯‍♀️ Lady Gaga and Doechii bring the fashion to the dancefloor in their latest music video 💃 #FashionistasUnite

item.title: Bring Me the Horizon Announce Fall 2026 North American Tour
item.description: 🎸 Pump up the volume, Bring Me the Horizon is hitting the road! 🚗🎶 Who's ready to rock out in Fall 2026? #BMTHtour

item.title: Watch David Byrne & St. Vincent bring each other out at NOLA Jazz Fest
item.description: 🎷 Grooving at NOLA Jazz Fest with David Byrne & St. Vincent's epic collab! 🎶 Who else caught this dynamic duo live? 🎤 #JazzFestVibes

item.title: Lizzo Celebrates Her Birthday by Announcing New Album ‘Bitch’
item.description: 🎉 Party time! 🎉 Lizzo is dropping a new album, 'Bitch,' to celebrate her birthday! 🎶🎂 #Lizzo #NewMusic
